name: com.unity.cinemachine
description:
Smart camera tools for passionate creators. 

Cinemachine 3 is a newer and better version of Cinemachine, but upgrading an existing project from 2.X will likely require some effort.  If you're considering upgrading an older project, please see our upgrade guide in the user manual.

samples.description: Sample scenes illustrating various ways to use Cinemachine in a 2D setting
Sample scenes illustrating various ways to use Cinemachine in a 3D setting
Sample scenes illustrating various ways to use Cinemachine with the input system.

_upm.changelog:
### Bugfixes
- Fixed stack frame snapshot not resetting when CameraBlendStack completed blend.
- Fixed blend cancellation not taking into account updates to "cancelled" camera state
- Added a null check to avoid an issue when deleting a CinemachineCamera with a CinemachinePixelPerfect extension.

### Changed
- Added support for fast enter play mode.
